title: Gracewell NEXUS
description: Full stack HR web application built for a real client. Handles attendance, payroll, and employee management.

title: Smart Multi-Institute Queuing System
description: UI/UX design for a multi-institute queuing system with a chatbot mascot AIvin. Designed in Figma as team lead.

title: Chef Lakbay
description: Android cooking game built for IT Skills Olympics 2024. Developed using Unity and GIMP.

title: SeaStack
description: A custom programming language with its own syntax, type system, and runtime. Built as a language design project.

title: Best of Luck — Cubao Expo
description: Reservation system UI/UX for a Taiwanese-inspired venue at Cubao Expo. Deep forest green and matte crimson theme.
